name: Moussaka
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onion in a frying pan until no longer pink. Drain any excess fat.
2. In a large bowl, combine stewed tomatoes, tomato sauce, ketchup, salt, pepper, powdered garlic, parsley, basil, and oregano. Mix well.
3. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Soak the zucchini squash in water for about 10 minutes, then drain any excess liquid.
5. Slice each zucchini lengthwise into thin pieces (about 1/4 inch thick).
6. Place a layer of zucchini squash in a large baking dish.
7. Spread a thin layer of the tomato mixture over the zucchini.
8. Add a layer of mozzarella cheese (about 1/4 inch thick).
9. Repeat steps 5-8 until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of mozzarella cheese on top.
10. Cover the baking dish with foil and bake for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the zucchini is tender and the cheese is melted and golden brown.
11. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
